requirement_topic.en: RoHS-Equivalent — Hazardous Substance Restrictions (Act on Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles)
requirement_topic.zh: RoHS 等效——有害物质限制（《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》）
requirement_topic.zht: RoHS 等效——有害物質限制（《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》）

summary.en: South Korea's RoHS-equivalent regime is the Act on the Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles (administered by the Ministry of Environment), which restricts hazardous substances in designated electrical and electronic equipment placed on the Korean market. The restricted substances mirror the EU RoHS list: Lead (Pb) ≤0.1%, Mercury (Hg) ≤0.1%, Cadmium (Cd) ≤0.01%, Hexavalent chromium (Cr(VI)) ≤0.1%, Polybrominated biphenyls (PBB) ≤0.1%, Polybrominated diphenyl ethers (PBDE) ≤0.1%, and the four phthalates DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP each ≤0.1% (the phthalates were phased into the Korean restricted list following the EU expansion). Producers must ensure designated EEE complies with the maximum concentration values in homogeneous materials and must maintain supporting test data and a declaration of compliance; the Ministry of Environment enforces via market surveillance. Verify the current designated-product scope and the applicable substance list and effective dates, since the phthalate restriction phase-in and product scope are set by the enforcement decree and MOE notices.
summary.zh: 韩国的 RoHS 等效制度为《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》（由环境部管理），限制在韩国市场销售的指定电气电子设备中的有害物质。限制物质对应欧盟 RoHS 清单：铅（Pb）≤0.1%、汞（Hg）≤0.1%、镉（Cd）≤0.01%、六价铬（Cr(VI)）≤0.1%、多溴联苯（PBB）≤0.1%、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）≤0.1%，以及四项邻苯二甲酸酯 DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP 各 ≤0.1%（邻苯二甲酸酯在欧盟扩展后纳入韩国限制清单）。生产者须确保指定 EEE 在均质材料中符合最大浓度值，并须保存支持性检测数据及符合声明；环境部通过市场监管执法。请核查现行指定产品范围、适用物质清单及生效日期，因为邻苯二甲酸酯限制的分阶段实施及产品范围由施行令及环境部公告规定。
summary.zht: 韓國的 RoHS 等效制度為《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》（由環境部管理），限制在韓國市場銷售的指定電氣電子設備中的有害物質。限制物質對應歐盟 RoHS 清單：鉛（Pb）≤0.1%、汞（Hg）≤0.1%、鎘（Cd）≤0.01%、六價鉻（Cr(VI)）≤0.1%、多溴聯苯（PBB）≤0.1%、多溴二苯醚（PBDE）≤0.1%，以及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯 DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP 各 ≤0.1%（鄰苯二甲酸酯在歐盟擴展後納入韓國限制清單）。生產者須確保指定 EEE 在均質材料中符合最大濃度值，並須保存支持性檢測數據及符合聲明；環境部通過市場監管執法。請核查現行指定產品範圍、適用物質清單及生效日期，因為鄰苯二甲酸酯限制的分階段實施及產品範圍由施行令及環境部公告規定。

standards_or_laws: Act on the Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles — hazardous substance restrictions for designated EEE (Ministry of Environment, Republic of Korea)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in electrical and electronic products), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same concentration thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, SJ/T 11364-2014) requires a hazardous substance disclosure label (orange for contains substances above threshold / green for below threshold) on EEE products sold in China. As of 2026, the 4 phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added by EU Directive 2015/863 are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list under GB/T 26572.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），浓度限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中国销售的 EEE 产品上贴附有害物质披露标识（含量超过限值为橙色/低于限值为绿色）。截至 2026 年，欧盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未纳入中国 GB/T 26572 强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），濃度限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法，SJ/T 11364-2014）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 產品上貼附有害物質披露標識（含量超過限值為橙色/低於限值為綠色）。截至 2026 年，歐盟指令 2015/863 新增的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）尚未納入中國 GB/T 26572 強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: The most significant gap is the 4 phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP), which Korea restricts under the Act on the Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles but which are not in CN GB/T 26572 — CN-compliant products have not been tested for phthalates under CN RoHS. For Korean market entry, manufacturers must test all homogeneous materials (especially plastics, cables, insulation, gaskets) for the 4 phthalates in addition to the original 6 substances. Additionally, Korea requires producers of designated EEE to ensure compliance with the maximum concentration values and maintain supporting documentation/declaration for Ministry of Environment surveillance; CN RoHS 2 focuses on a disclosure label rather than a market-access restriction. Verify the current designated-product scope and effective dates for the phthalate restriction under the Korean enforcement decree and MOE notices.
gap.zh: 最重要的差距是 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP），韩国依据《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》予以限制，但这些物质不在中国 GB/T 26572 中——符合中国标准的产品未经中国 RoHS 框架下的邻苯二甲酸酯检测。进入韩国市场前，制造商除原 6 项物质外，还须对所有均质材料（尤其是塑料、电缆、绝缘材料、垫圈）进行 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯检测。此外，韩国要求指定 EEE 的生产者确保符合最大浓度值，并保存供环境部监管的支持性文件/声明；中国 RoHS 2 侧重披露标签而非市场准入限制。请核查韩国施行令及环境部公告中现行指定产品范围及邻苯二甲酸酯限制的生效日期。
gap.zht: 最重要的差距是 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP），韓國依據《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》予以限制，但這些物質不在中國 GB/T 26572 中——符合中國標準的產品未經中國 RoHS 框架下的鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。進入韓國市場前，製造商除原 6 項物質外，還須對所有均質材料（尤其是塑料、電纜、絕緣材料、墊圈）進行 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。此外，韓國要求指定 EEE 的生產者確保符合最大濃度值，並保存供環境部監管的支持性文件/聲明；中國 RoHS 2 側重披露標籤而非市場准入限制。請核查韓國施行令及環境部公告中現行指定產品範圍及鄰苯二甲酸酯限制的生效日期。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — designated EEE must comply with hazardous substance maximum concentration values (including the 4 phthalates) under the Act on the Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles; producer compliance documentation required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Environment / Korea Law Information Center (law.go.kr), Republic of Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Korea's RoHS-equivalent restrictions under the Act on the Resource Circulation of Electrical and Electronic Equipment and Vehicles apply to designated EEE including LED luminaires and restrict the original 6 RoHS substances plus the 4 phthalates not covered by CN GB/T 26572. Manufacturers must test for the 4 phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) — CN RoHS compliance alone is insufficient — and maintain producer compliance documentation for Ministry of Environment surveillance. Verify the current designated-product scope and phthalate effective dates in the Korean enforcement decree and MOE notices.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国《电气电子产品及汽车资源循环法》下的 RoHS 等效限制适用于包括 LED 灯具在内的指定 EEE，限制原 6 项 RoHS 物质及中国 GB/T 26572 未涵盖的 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯。制造商须对 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）进行检测——仅满足中国 RoHS 合规不足——并保存供环境部监管的生产者符合文件。请核查韩国施行令及环境部公告中现行指定产品范围及邻苯二甲酸酯生效日期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國《電氣電子產品及汽車資源循環法》下的 RoHS 等效限制適用於包括 LED 燈具在內的指定 EEE，限制原 6 項 RoHS 物質及中國 GB/T 26572 未涵蓋的 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯。製造商須對 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）進行檢測——僅滿足中國 RoHS 合規不足——並保存供環境部監管的生產者符合文件。請核查韓國施行令及環境部公告中現行指定產品範圍及鄰苯二甲酸酯生效日期。

requirement_topic.en: K-REACH Chemical Registration and Information Obligations vs CN Chemical Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: K-REACH 化学品登记及信息义务与中国化学品法规
requirement_topic.zht: K-REACH 化學品登記及信息義務與中國化學品法規

summary.en: South Korea's Act on the Registration and Evaluation of Chemical Substances (K-REACH, administered by the Ministry of Environment) governs chemical substances manufactured or imported into Korea. For finished articles such as LED luminaires, the most relevant K-REACH duty is the information obligation for substances of concern in articles: where an article contains a substance designated by the Ministry of Environment (e.g., a substance subject to authorization or restriction, or a substance of high concern) above the applicable threshold (commonly 0.1% w/w), the supplier/importer must provide prescribed information to recipients and, on request, to the public. Korea also maintains a list of substances subject to reporting/notification, and importers of articles containing such substances above the threshold may have a reporting duty. K-REACH compliance is an ongoing obligation tied to the evolving Korean lists, not a one-time test. Verify the current Korean lists and thresholds with the Ministry of Environment / National Institute of Environmental Research (NIER).
summary.zh: 韩国《化学物质登记及评价法》（K-REACH，由环境部管理）规范在韩国制造或进口的化学物质。对于 LED 灯具等成品物品，K-REACH 最相关的义务是物品中关注物质的信息义务：当物品中含有环境部指定的物质（如受许可或限制的物质，或高度关注物质）且超过适用阈值（通常为 0.1% 质量分数）时，供应商/进口商须向接收方提供规定信息，并应请求向公众提供。韩国还维护须报告/申报的物质清单，进口含此类物质超过阈值的物品的进口商可能负有报告义务。K-REACH 合规是与不断演变的韩国清单挂钩的持续性义务，而非一次性测试。请向环境部/国立环境科学院（NIER）核查现行韩国清单及阈值。
summary.zht: 韓國《化學物質登記及評價法》（K-REACH，由環境部管理）規範在韓國製造或進口的化學物質。對於 LED 燈具等成品物品，K-REACH 最相關的義務是物品中關注物質的信息義務：當物品中含有環境部指定的物質（如受許可或限制的物質，或高度關注物質）且超過適用閾值（通常為 0.1% 質量分數）時，供應商/進口商須向接收方提供規定信息，並應請求向公眾提供。韓國還維護須報告/申報的物質清單，進口含此類物質超過閾值的物品的進口商可能負有報告義務。K-REACH 合規是與不斷演變的韓國清單掛鈎的持續性義務，而非一次性測試。請向環境部/國立環境科學院（NIER）核查現行韓國清單及閾值。

standards_or_laws: Act on the Registration and Evaluation of Chemical Substances (K-REACH) — information and reporting obligations for substances of concern in articles (Ministry of Environment, Republic of Korea)
Korean lists of substances subject to authorization / restriction / reporting — maintained by MOE / NIER (verify current entries and thresholds)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the K-REACH article-information obligation. The closest CN instruments are: MEP (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) Order No. 12 (2010, revised) on new chemical substance registration; GB 30981-2020 (Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals labelling; and the Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (MEE Order 12, 2020). None of these create an equivalent obligation to proactively provide prescribed information when a designated substance of concern is present in an article above the applicable threshold.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应 K-REACH 物品信息义务的制度。最接近的中国法规工具包括：生态环境部（MEP）令第 12 号（2010 年，经修订）关于新化学物质登记；GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则）用于危险化学品标签；以及《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》（生态环境部令第 12 号，2020 年）。上述均未产生与之相当的、在物品中存在指定关注物质超过适用阈值时主动提供规定信息的义务。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應 K-REACH 物品信息義務的制度。最接近的中國法規工具包括：生態環境部（MEP）令第 12 號（2010 年，經修訂）關於新化學物質登記；GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則）用於危險化學品標籤；以及《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》（生態環境部令第 12 號，2020 年）。上述均未產生與之相當的、在物品中存在指定關注物質超過適用閾值時主動提供規定信息的義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: K-REACH article-information and reporting duties are ongoing compliance obligations with no CN equivalent. Chinese LED luminaire manufacturers entering the Korean market must: (1) establish a process to screen their supply chain against the Korean lists of designated substances (authorization/restriction/reporting) as they are updated; (2) be prepared to provide the prescribed information to recipients (and the public on request) where a designated substance is present above the threshold (commonly 0.1% w/w); (3) determine whether the importer of record bears a reporting duty for articles containing such substances above the threshold. This requires a supply chain management process and a live connection to the Korean MOE/NIER lists — not a one-time factory test. The Korean lists differ from the EU ECHA Candidate List, so EU REACH SVHC screening does not automatically satisfy K-REACH.
gap.zh: K-REACH 物品信息及报告义务是无中国对应要求的持续性合规义务。进入韩国市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：（1）建立针对韩国指定物质清单（许可/限制/报告）随更新进行供应链核查的流程；（2）准备在指定物质存在且超过阈值（通常为 0.1% 质量分数）时向接收方提供规定信息（并应请求向公众提供）；（3）确定进口记录方对含此类物质超过阈值的物品是否负有报告义务。这需要供应链管理流程及与韩国环境部/NIER 清单的实时对接——而非一次性工厂检测。韩国清单不同于欧盟 ECHA 候选清单，故欧盟 REACH SVHC 筛查不自动满足 K-REACH。
gap.zht: K-REACH 物品信息及報告義務是無中國對應要求的持續性合規義務。進入韓國市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：（1）建立針對韓國指定物質清單（許可/限制/報告）隨更新進行供應鏈核查的流程；（2）準備在指定物質存在且超過閾值（通常為 0.1% 質量分數）時向接收方提供規定信息（並應請求向公眾提供）；（3）確定進口記錄方對含此類物質超過閾值的物品是否負有報告義務。這需要供應鏈管理流程及與韓國環境部/NIER 清單的實時對接——而非一次性工廠檢測。韓國清單不同於歐盟 ECHA 候選清單，故歐盟 REACH SVHC 篩查不自動滿足 K-REACH。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — K-REACH information obligation applies where a designated substance of concern is present in an article above the applicable threshold; importer reporting duty may also apply (verify current Korean lists and thresholds)
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no article-level supply chain information obligation equivalent to K-REACH exists in China as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Environment, Republic of Korea (K-REACH)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] K-REACH article-information and reporting duties are mandatory ongoing obligations for LED luminaire importers or Korean producers. There is no CN equivalent, and EU REACH SVHC screening does not automatically satisfy K-REACH because the Korean designated-substance lists differ. Chinese manufacturers must establish a process to track the Korean MOE/NIER lists and screen their supply chain, and be prepared to provide prescribed information where a designated substance is present above the applicable threshold. Verify the current Korean lists and thresholds with the Ministry of Environment / NIER.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] K-REACH 物品信息及报告义务是 LED 灯具进口商或韩国生产者的持续性强制义务。中国无对应要求，且欧盟 REACH SVHC 筛查不自动满足 K-REACH，因为韩国指定物质清单不同。中国制造商须建立跟踪韩国环境部/NIER 清单并核查供应链的流程，并准备在指定物质存在且超过适用阈值时提供规定信息。请向环境部/NIER 核查现行韩国清单及阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] K-REACH 物品信息及報告義務是 LED 燈具進口商或韓國生產者的持續性強制義務。中國無對應要求，且歐盟 REACH SVHC 篩查不自動滿足 K-REACH，因為韓國指定物質清單不同。中國製造商須建立跟蹤韓國環境部/NIER 清單並核查供應鏈的流程，並準備在指定物質存在且超過適用閾值時提供規定信息。請向環境部/NIER 核查現行韓國清單及閾值。

requirement_topic.en: KC Mark Overall Process and Technical Documentation vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: KC 标志整体流程与技术文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: KC 標誌整體流程與技術文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: The KC Mark for LED luminaires in South Korea is obtained under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (administered by KATS under MOTIE). The conformity route depends on the product's risk class: (1) KC Safety Certification (안전인증) — mandatory third-party certification with type testing and factory inspection for higher-risk products; (2) Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation (안전확인) — supplier obtains a test report from a designated body and registers, for medium-risk products; (3) Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (공급자적합성확인) — supplier self-declares based on testing, for lower-risk products. Required steps: compile a technical file (design data, component specs, test reports to the applicable KS standard such as KS C 7653 / IEC 60598); have a designated test body (KTC, KTL, KTR) conduct testing; obtain the certificate or complete the confirmation/registration with KATS; affix the KC Mark and the certification/registration number; and (for the KC-EMC aspect) complete the separate RRA registration. An importer/agent in Korea is typically the certificate holder or responsible party. CCC certification bodies are not recognised for KC marking purposes.
summary.zh: 韩国 LED 灯具的 KC 标志依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（由产业通商资源部下属 KATS 管理）取得。合格评定路径取决于产品风险等级：（1）KC 安全认证（안전인증）——针对较高风险产品的强制性第三方认证，含型式试验及工厂检查；（2）自律安全确认（안전확인）——针对中等风险产品，供应商从指定机构获取检测报告并注册；（3）供应商符合性确认（공급자적합성확인）——针对较低风险产品，供应商基于检测自我声明。所需步骤：编制技术文件（设计数据、零部件规格、依据适用 KS 标准如 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 的检测报告）；由指定检测机构（KTC、KTL、KTR）进行检测；取得证书或在 KATS 完成确认/注册；标注 KC 标志及认证/注册编号；并（就 KC-EMC 而言）完成单独的 RRA 注册。韩国境内的进口商/代理通常为证书持有人或责任方。CCC 认证机构不被 KC 标志目的所认可。
summary.zht: 韓國 LED 燈具的 KC 標誌依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（由產業通商資源部下屬 KATS 管理）取得。合格評定路徑取決於產品風險等級：（1）KC 安全認證（안전인증）——針對較高風險產品的強制性第三方認證，含型式試驗及工廠檢查；（2）自律安全確認（안전확인）——針對中等風險產品，供應商從指定機構獲取檢測報告並注冊；（3）供應商符合性確認（공급자적합성확인）——針對較低風險產品，供應商基於檢測自我聲明。所需步驟：編制技術文件（設計數據、零部件規格、依據適用 KS 標準如 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 的檢測報告）；由指定檢測機構（KTC、KTL、KTR）進行檢測；取得證書或在 KATS 完成確認/注冊；標註 KC 標誌及認證/注冊編號；並（就 KC-EMC 而言）完成單獨的 RRA 注冊。韓國境內的進口商/代理通常為證書持有人或責任方。CCC 認證機構不被 KC 標誌目的所認可。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act — KC Safety Certification / Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation / Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (KATS, MOTIE)
KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 — applicable safety standards; designated test bodies KTC / KTL / KTR

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China). CCC requires mandatory third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized certification body (e.g., CQC — China Quality Certification Centre). CQC voluntary certification is also available for products not covered by mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is additionally required in China. CCC certification bodies are not recognised for South Korea KC marking purposes.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授权认证机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）进行强制性第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，CQC 自愿性认证亦可申请。对于集成无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED），在中国还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。CCC 认证机构不被韩国 KC 标志目的所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授權認證機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）進行強制性第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，CQC 自願性認證亦可申請。對於集成無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED），在中國還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。CCC 認證機構不被韓國 KC 標誌目的所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: Both Korea (KC) and China (CCC) use a risk-tiered mandatory certification model, but the schemes are parallel with no mutual recognition — a product requires separate technical files, test reports, and certification/registration for each market. Key Korea-specific points vs CN: (1) the Korean route is risk-class-dependent (KC Safety Certification vs Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation vs Supplier's Declaration of Conformity), and the higher tier requires factory inspection — verify the correct route for the specific LED luminaire; (2) testing must be at a KATS-designated body (KTC, KTL, KTR) to the applicable KS standard (KS C 7653 / IEC 60598) — CN CCC reports under GB 7000.1 are not accepted directly; (3) KC-EMC is a separate RRA registration distinct from KC safety; (4) Korean test conditions reflect 220 V / 60 Hz (vs China's 50 Hz). Korean energy efficiency grade registration (KEA/KEMCO) and K-REACH duties are additional obligations not covered by CCC. An importer/agent in Korea typically holds the certificate or acts as the responsible party.
gap.zh: 韩国（KC）与中国（CCC）均采用按风险分级的强制认证模式，但两套方案并行且不存在互认——产品须为各市场分别准备技术文件、检测报告及认证/注册。相对中国的主要韩国特有事项：（1）韩国路径取决于风险等级（KC 安全认证 vs 自律安全确认 vs 供应商符合性确认），较高等级须工厂检查——请核实具体 LED 灯具的正确路径；（2）检测须在 KATS 指定机构（KTC、KTL、KTR）依据适用 KS 标准（KS C 7653 / IEC 60598）进行——中国 GB 7000.1 下的 CCC 报告不被直接接受；（3）KC-EMC 为与 KC 安全分开的独立 RRA 注册；（4）韩国测试条件反映 220 V / 60 Hz（相对中国 50 Hz）。韩国能效等级注册（KEA/KEMCO）及 K-REACH 义务是 CCC 未涵盖的额外义务。韩国境内的进口商/代理通常持有证书或作为责任方。
gap.zht: 韓國（KC）與中國（CCC）均採用按風險分級的強制認證模式，但兩套方案並行且不存在互認——產品須為各市場分別準備技術文件、檢測報告及認證/注冊。相對中國的主要韓國特有事項：（1）韓國路徑取決於風險等級（KC 安全認證 vs 自律安全確認 vs 供應商符合性確認），較高等級須工廠檢查——請核實具體 LED 燈具的正確路徑；（2）檢測須在 KATS 指定機構（KTC、KTL、KTR）依據適用 KS 標準（KS C 7653 / IEC 60598）進行——中國 GB 7000.1 下的 CCC 報告不被直接接受；（3）KC-EMC 為與 KC 安全分開的獨立 RRA 注冊；（4）韓國測試條件反映 220 V / 60 Hz（相對中國 50 Hz）。韓國能效等級注冊（KEA/KEMCO）及 K-REACH 義務是 CCC 未涵蓋的額外義務。韓國境內的進口商/代理通常持有證書或作為責任方。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC Mark required before South Korea market placement under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act; conformity route (Certification / Confirmation / Declaration) depends on risk class; separate RRA KC-EMC registration also required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS), MOTIE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The KC Mark for LED luminaires requires a risk-class-dependent conformity route (KC Safety Certification, Self-regulatory Safety Confirmation, or Supplier's Declaration of Conformity) under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, with testing at a KATS-designated body (KTC/KTL/KTR) to KS C 7653 / IEC 60598. KC and CCC are parallel non-mutual processes; CN CCC reports are not accepted directly. KC-EMC (RRA) registration, energy efficiency grade registration (KEA/KEMCO), and K-REACH duties add to the scope. Re-confirm test conditions under Korea's 220 V / 60 Hz mains and verify the correct conformity route for the specific product.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具的 KC 标志依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求采用按风险等级确定的合格评定路径（KC 安全认证、自律安全确认或供应商符合性确认），并由 KATS 指定机构（KTC/KTL/KTR）依据 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 进行检测。KC 与 CCC 为并行的非互认流程；中国 CCC 报告不被直接接受。KC-EMC（RRA）注册、能效等级注册（KEA/KEMCO）及 K-REACH 义务进一步扩大了合规范围。请在韩国 220 V / 60 Hz 电源条件下重新确认测试条件，并核实具体产品的正确合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具的 KC 標誌依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》要求採用按風險等級確定的合格評定路徑（KC 安全認證、自律安全確認或供應商符合性確認），並由 KATS 指定機構（KTC/KTL/KTR）依據 KS C 7653 / IEC 60598 進行檢測。KC 與 CCC 為並行的非互認流程；中國 CCC 報告不被直接接受。KC-EMC（RRA）注冊、能效等級注冊（KEA/KEMCO）及 K-REACH 義務進一步擴大了合規範圍。請在韓國 220 V / 60 Hz 電源條件下重新確認測試條件，並核實具體產品的正確合格評定路徑。
